challenges.metaDescription: Explore exciting outdoor challenges designed for kids. Athletic, creative, exploration, and teamwork challenges await your team.

leaderboard.description: Compete globally, regionally, or weekly. Every challenge counts.
leaderboard.metaDescription: See how your team ranks against others worldwide. Compete in weekly, monthly, and global leaderboards.

safety.title: Safety First, Always

safety.metaDescription: Learn how Supacamp protects your child with COPPA compliance, content moderation, and privacy-first design.

videoGallery.metaDescription: Browse incredible AI-transformed videos from teams around the world. See what happens when real adventures meet AI magic.

teamVsTeam.metaDescription: Challenge other teams to head-to-head competitions. Complete the same challenge and let the community vote for the winner!

parentalControls.description: Full visibility and control for parents. Because trust is earned.
parentalControls.metaDescription: Supacamp gives parents complete control over their child's experience with PIN protection, consent management, and activity monitoring.

rewards.title: Rewards & Badges

rewards.metaDescription: Earn fun sticker badges and rewards as your team completes challenges. Collect them all and show off your achievements!

step1.title: Form Your Team
step1.description: Create a team and invite your friends with a simple code.

step2.title: Pick a Challenge
step2.description: Choose from dozens of fun, safe, admin-approved challenges.

step3.title: Record & Transform
step3.description: Film yourselves completing the challenge. AI makes it look incredible.

whatIs.question: What is Supacamp?
whatIs.answer: Supacamp is a platform where kids form teams, complete real-world challenges, and use AI to transform their videos into stunning clips. It's designed to get kids active, creative, and having fun outdoors.

isSafe.question: Is Supacamp safe for my child?
isSafe.answer: Absolutely. Child safety is our #1 priority. We're COPPA compliant, require parental consent, have no direct messaging, no public profiles, and every video goes through AI content moderation before anyone sees it.

howAiWorks.question: How does the AI video transformation work?
howAiWorks.answer: After your team records a challenge video, our AI (powered by cutting-edge technology) transforms it into a stylized, cinematic clip — think comic book action, watercolor dreams, or paper craft animations. The original is always kept private.

cost.question: Is Supacamp free?
cost.answer: Supacamp offers a free tier with access to challenges and basic video transformations. Premium features may be available in the future.

age.question: What ages is Supacamp for?
age.answer: Supacamp is designed for kids aged 6-17. Children under 13 require verified parental consent to create an account.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Adventure?
cta.subtitle: Create your team today and turn the real world into your playground.

dashboard.noTeam: You haven't joined a team yet.

auth.parentConsent: I am the parent/guardian and I consent to my child using Supacamp
auth.parentVerificationDesc: We've sent an email to your parent. They need to verify and give consent before you can start.
auth.ageCheckDescription: We need to know your age to keep you safe. This is required by law.
auth.tooYoung: Sorry, you must be at least 6 years old to join Supacamp.
auth.parentRequired: Since you're under 13, we need a parent or guardian to help set up your account.
auth.parentEmailDescription: Enter your parent or guardian's email address. We'll send them a message to approve your account.
auth.parentConsentDescription: A parent or guardian must agree to the following to create this account.
auth.parentConsentDataCollection: I consent to the collection of my child's display name, avatar selection, and challenge participation data.
auth.parentConsentSafety: I understand Supacamp uses content moderation and safety features to protect my child.
auth.parentConsentTerms: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.profileSetupDescription: Choose a display name and avatar. Don't use your real name!
auth.displayNameHint: Pick a fun name! Don't use your real name.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSent: Check your email! We've sent you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Your password has been reset! You can now sign in.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
